results.rendered_html: anṛśaṃsa (3. a + nṛśaṃsa) adj. f. ā nicht grausam, milde: teṣāṃ yo 'nṛśaṃsatamaḥ syāt  KĀTY. ŚR. 22,4,7 . vatsalā cānṛśaṃsā ca tvaṃ hi nityaṃ pareṣvapi  R. 2,62,7 . Davon nom. abstr. anṛśaṃsatva 46,8 . und anṛśaṃsatā 3,58,42 . 5,19,17 . Vgl. ānṛśaṃsya.
